name: Party A Who Lives Beside Me
overview: A new type of male and female relationship that is both a "neighbor" and "Party A and Party B". Li Zenan, a neighbor of Shanghai Piao's elite, and Ye Xuan shared hardships in the workplace. During a crisis, they worked together to investigate the truth. They come to trust each other and developed a neighbor city love story of "Party B" and "Party A Devil".

trailers.title: 【“心动越界”版预告】谢彬彬王字璇超甜对视《住在我隔壁的甲方 Party A Who Lives Beside Me》【芒果TV青春剧场】
